name: Baneshade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>災</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わざわ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc:
Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; apply this effect based on the number of cards in their GY with that face-up card's name.
● 1: Destroy it.
● 2: Banish it.
● 3+: Banish it, also all cards with that name from your opponent's field and GY (face-down).
eff:
Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; apply this effect based on the number of cards in their GY with that face-up card's name.
● 1: Destroy it.
● 2: Banish it.
● 3+: Banish it, also all cards with that name from your opponent's field and GY (face-down).

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
